title: laphamia bisetosa var. bisetosa
intro: Laphamia bisetosa var. bisetosa, also known as Mexican Devil or Hierba del Barro, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Laphamia bisetosa var. bisetosa include relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Laphamia bisetosa var. bisetosa can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments for external use, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
